chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-4734 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Fresh case 1. For orders on Misc. No.19806/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections 1 to 10 3. For orders on Misc. No.19807/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For orders on Misc. No.19808/2025 (Stay/A) 5. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 08.10.2025 Mr. Mirza Mehmood Baig, advocate for petitioner ------------------------------ Leaned counsel for petitioner submits that the petitioner has filed Online Complaint No.SCRM-20250911-8 before the Sindh Building Control Authority Karachi, on 11.09.2025. Perusal of Page 43 of the file reveals that the complaint of the petitioner has been forwarded to the Director of the District concerned of S.B.C.A. on 15.09.2025 and the same is under process. As such, this petition is premature. Be that as it may, the Director General, Sindh Building Control Authority is directed to decide the complaint of the petitioner in accordance with their SOPs, expeditiously. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, Sindh Building Control Authority, Karachi, for information and compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
